5008373037.description: This client, LCOLE, operates under the parent JAMES FINANCIAL and is part of the open-ended funds sector in North America. The profile reflects significant financial exposures, including a large commitment amount and metrics relevant for credit risk assessment.

8009547821.description: MERIDIAN CAPITAL INVESTMENTS is a leading European investment bank specializing in fixed income derivatives and structured products. Operating under MERIDIAN HOLDINGS GROUP, they maintain substantial exposure to European sovereign debt markets and provide prime brokerage services to institutional clients across the EU.

6007892341.description: QUANTUM HEDGE STRATEGIES is a sophisticated quantitative hedge fund under QUANTUM FINANCIAL GROUP, employing algorithmic trading strategies across global equity markets. The fund specializes in market-neutral strategies with significant exposure to technology and financial sector equities, utilizing advanced machine learning models for alpha generation.

3001847562.description: Pinnacle Health Systems is a large nonprofit hospital network operating across the Southeast US with outstanding municipal revenue bonds used to finance capital expansion projects. The system includes 14 hospitals and over 200 outpatient facilities. Credit risk is driven by reimbursement rate sensitivity, operating margin compression, and exposure to Medicaid/Medicare policy changes.

4002938471.description: Coastal Bridge Advisors is a multi-strategy hedge fund with significant exposure to leveraged loans and CLO tranches. The fund employs a credit-focused strategy across investment grade and high yield markets, with notable concentration in financial services and energy sector credits. Prime brokerage leverage ratios are monitored closely given volatile credit spreads.

7003829471.description: Southeastern Power Authority is a state-chartered public utility responsible for electricity generation and distribution across Georgia and parts of the Carolinas. The authority has issued general obligation municipal bonds to fund grid modernization and renewable energy infrastructure. Risk exposure is driven by regulatory rate setting, construction cost overruns on nuclear capacity expansion, and weather-related demand volatility.

9004716253.description: Harbor View Private Equity is a leading mid-market LBO firm with a portfolio concentrated in industrials, healthcare services, and technology-enabled businesses. The firm relies heavily on syndicated leveraged loan markets for deal financing. Credit risk is elevated due to rising interest rate sensitivity on floating rate debt across portfolio companies, with several credits approaching covenant thresholds.

2005634819.description: Blue Ridge Community Bancorp is a $2.1B asset community bank headquartered in Asheville, NC, operating 38 branches across western North Carolina and eastern Tennessee. The bank maintains correspondent banking relationships for check clearing, wire transfers, and Fed Funds activity. Credit risk is driven by high concentration in mountain region commercial real estate and construction lending, with notable exposure to short-term vacation rental financing.

1006528374.description: Atlantic Mortgage Aggregators is a top-20 non-bank mortgage originator and servicer with a $48B servicing portfolio concentrated in conventional conforming and FHA/VA loan products. The firm aggregates loans from a correspondent network of over 400 community banks and credit unions for sale into agency MBS markets. Key risks include interest rate pipeline exposure, MSR valuation volatility, and warehouse line liquidity dependency during market dislocations.

5007419283.description: Carolinas REIT Partners is a publicly traded REIT specializing in office, mixed-use, and suburban retail properties across Charlotte, Raleigh, and Atlanta metro markets. The portfolio includes 42 properties totaling 8.7M square feet. Credit risk is elevated due to secular decline in office occupancy post-pandemic, with significant lease rollover exposure in 2025-2026, rising cap rates compressing asset values, and a floating rate debt structure sensitive to prolonged high interest rates.

8008374629.description: The City of Charlotte Municipal Authority manages debt issuance for infrastructure, transit, and capital improvement projects across Mecklenburg County. Charlotte carries a AAA/Aaa general obligation rating supported by a diverse, growing tax base anchored by the financial services sector. Risk factors include rapid population growth straining infrastructure capacity, rising pension obligations, and concentration of tax revenue from financial sector employers.

6009283746.industry_fund_type: Foreign Bank - Commercial Real Estate Lender
6009283746.description: Deutsche Pfandbriefbank AG is a German specialist bank focused on commercial real estate and public sector finance, with significant US CRE loan exposure acquired during the low-rate environment. The bank faces material credit deterioration in its US office loan book, with several large loans on non-accrual status. Cross-border settlement risk is elevated by EUR/USD FX volatility, and the bank is subject to ECB supervisory review regarding US CRE concentration limits.
